lesson.title: Lesson 1 - ha
lesson.text: aa ha h ah aaa a hh aaa ha hh h a ah aa aa a aaa h hh ah ha aa ah h hh aaa ha a h ha ah aaa aa hh a ha h aaa a ah hh aa hh ah a h aaa aa ha a h aa hh ha ah aaa a ha hh aaa h aa ah a ah hh ha h aa aaa ah aa hh h aaa ha a h aa aaa hh ha ah a h ah a ha hh aa aaa ah hh aa ha a aaa h h ah a aaa aa hh ha ha aa a ah hh aaa h ah a ha h hh aaa aa aaa aa h a ha ah hh h a ah aaa ha aa hh aaa hh aa h ha a ah ha ah a aa hh aaa h ah aa h ha hh aaa a a h ha ah aa aaa hh ha aaa ah h hh aa a a ha ah aaa hh aa h ha a h ah hh aa aaa ah a ha aa aaa hh h hh h aa ha ah a aaa h aaa hh aa ha ah a hh h ha aa aaa a ah ah a aaa hh ha h aa aa ah hh h aaa a ha aaa ah hh ha aa a h ha ah aaa hh a aa h aa ha hh aaa ah a h ha hh h aaa a ah aa h ah a aaa aa hh ha aa aaa hh ah h ha a ah hh h ha a aa aaa a h ah ha hh aaa aa hh aaa aa ha h ah a a ah aa hh h ha aaa aa ah aaa ha h hh a ah aa hh h aaa a ha hh h ha ah aa a aaa h hh aaa ah ha a aa h aaa aa hh ah ha a ah aa ha h aaa a hh a ha ah hh aaa h aa ha h a aaa hh ah aa

lesson.title: Lesson 2 - te
lesson.text: at ta he hate heath te ee ea ht tea tee th teeth thee ate hat t eh that the theta tt eat heat e et ae ata ht at that hate ae te ee ea eat tea ata tee hat et ta he th thee teeth t heath eh ate the tt heat theta e he thee at teeth ata ht that the ate theta t tt et eat ea e te ee ae hate eh heath ta th hat heat tee tea hat te at tea tee eat thee teeth hate e t he theta that tt heath ea ae heat ata eh th ta ate ht et the ee heath heat that ea t ht eh theta ta tee thee tea at he the et e hat ate tt teeth ae hate th ee te eat ata teeth e ae t theta tee he ht hate the tt ate ea thee th ta that eat at heath hat te heat eh tea ata ee et te ta heath tea he hat hate the tt eat tee ata t ae that theta ea ate teeth eh et thee ee th at ht e heat hat eat tea hate th theta tee ae that t et the thee eh ht ea teeth te heat ta ate tt e ata at heath he ee thee th the eat heath ee te e teeth that at hat theta ta eh tee t hate ea he tt et ata ate ae heat ht tea thee he theta tee ht tea eat teeth eh tt e

lesson.title: Lesson 3 - si
lesson.text: tests seas thats ties sas hit st ai site see ss sa east hi ste ati es assess as thesis thai asia sheets has states assist this its tie test ease state set sit isa she sees sites ts hist stats ie s estate ash ieee ti i est estates sat assists his taste sea it sie hs hits iii haiti ii hats ia stat these sets sheet hash is se seats sh ist seat si asset assets ii thai haiti sets isa hs es asia estate she se assets sheets ie iii est tie assists ss sas this sit si asset seas has sites as stats hits hats ieee assist sea set s sa ste states i sheet it sat see hist sie hash thats sh ia stat seat hi site is seats his tests thesis taste its ties sees test ease st east ts ai ati ist state ash estates ti assess hit these ai his sat isa it sh sea s sites states hats estates seas stat hits ii as she assist sees estate sie ss i taste st sa tie hs seat this assists these ieee est ist ie sas si east sheet hash se asia ti iii assets sheets ties set ts haiti es seats test asset stats tests is thesis ste

lesson.title: Lesson 4 - nc
lesson.text: enhance sense cnn anti then cnet chance sec ce tenant cache nissan nec scsi case ann tn scenic saint ch titten en act ascii cassette inns ntsc ins ec hansen ana teens chen accent isaac stan ethnic sans than chi sean cheat instances teaches sin ethics access chinese cet teach antenna tc sc hint tennis asin inn nh ic shine cheese essence seen cheats athens ten cents annie ancient nt chan instant china hints scene intent issn cincinnati attach ice science acc cities anna insects sentences chains tin an cash ac statistics sn cst nathan chain chances nat hc cats assistant ne ci intense nine hans chase scientist nasa assistance catch each saints instance c hence anne ant cite santa sciences css ni cas in int teen chest casa ian cn ca tactics static sent scientists titans etc tent n nn cases acne cent cast inches sci cat hitachi cia sic san nc can ns inc thin na since ace cc tech asn inch asian scenes technician ent senate nest chat entities ncaa cs tennessee acts sentence nice ict net cant

lesson.text: Jamie Height P / Namely Prefers Staffing , Crops Yes Kde / Calendar Virgin Vpn - Joan Lenders Model / Specific Durham Quarters . Glad Beings Optimum = Printing Zone Inkjet . Daughter Kerry Cape ' Margaret Record Opera / Noted Lip Quiz = Ben Keys Advances ; Null Warrior Quest - Quebec Idea Kenya / Lab Erik Ix - Der Ultimate Unlike ; Failing Guyana Keyboard / Disc Legs Enclosed - Echo Breeds Cement , Anne Viking Digital = Region Quote Promo = Yields Tourism Rca , Jam Woods Adjacent . lesson.text: dc - nervous - Lodging, Just "Middle - Pill - unwrap - gas - Handed - Facing ] Highly 'Cw [ teaches - Strain@ Japan - Wind - Memo - Marion@ Adapted - Albums@ Peter - modern: Wales - Define@ beta@ air - Emperor / carmen@ Exec@ Vpn, entity!
